requested_items.objective: Account measured output-projection producer PPA together with measured output-ranker policy-wrapper PPA and report timing, area, power, and service-cycle overhead.

expected_result.reason: If additive accounting shows producer-dominated timing and bounded overhead, use it as the producer-side integration baseline; otherwise split or gate the ranker wrapper before monolithic integration.
